title: Better Bare Bones Copper Golem
description: Replaces Bare Bones/Trailers Vision Copper Golem and Chests
body:
# **A replacement for Copper Golem and Chest textures**
That resourcepack is made by Nioum, for Copper Age update.

![FEATURES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a878121721f35acb126ff78db905ea7d64591736.png)

💙 Changed Copper Golem textures

💙 Changed Chest textures

💙 Desatured basic copper blocks

![Changes of pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/621e58640c00a0c31f00f3995ec3bfac46c0e84d.png)

...That's all, have fun!
